title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
